message:
refactor(malloc): remove dead __libc_* internal malloc aliases

Remove 9 __libc_* alias functions (__libc_malloc, __libc_free,
__libc_calloc, __libc_realloc, __libc_memalign, __libc_pvalloc,
__libc_valloc, __libc_mallopt, __libc_mallinfo) that were simple
wrappers forwarding to their public counterparts. These glibc-internal
aliases are not needed in FrankenLibC's membrane architecture and
constitute dead code. Retain __libc_freeres as the sole alias (used
by valgrind/ASan for resource cleanup signaling).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
